name: ACK Sports Injury Spine and Trauma Centre in Bawal
description: ACK Sports Injury Spine and Trauma Centre in Bawal provides the latest technologies for treating sports injuries. Services include endoscopic spine surgery for disc issues, arthroscopic surgery for knee and shoulder injuries, fracture repair, and joint replacements. It treats ACL, PCL, MCL, and LCL injuries; shoulder injuries such as Bankart's lesion, SLAP tear, recurrent dislocation, and rotator cuff tears through arthroscopy; spine diseases such as scoliosis, kyphosis, Pott's spine, and PIVD using endoscopic discectomy and endoscopic spinal fusion; ankle ligament injuries; deformity corrections; limb length discrepancy; bow leg and knock knee treatments; and robotic knee surgery. It manages orthopedic trauma and accidental cases with minimally invasive surgery and aims to offer affordable care for Indian middle-class families.

Beyond its clinical excellence, Advanced Rheumatology VH heart care plays a pivotal role in enhancing healthcare accessibility and trust within the community. name: ASPEN Clinic
description: Aspen Clinic is committed to offering advanced surgical treatments, including general surgery, cosmetic surgeries and treatments, surgical lasers, laparoscopic surgeries, and coloproctology treatments. Our founder, Dr. Hina Khan, is a General Surgeon (M.S) and Aesthetic Physician. A Certified Fellow from the American Academy in Aesthetic Medicine (AAAM). Combining knowledge in Medical Aesthetics with the latest in Surgery at Aspen Clinic on NIBM Road, we provide a plethora of cutting-edge surgical treatments, laser treatments, advanced wound care, and cosmetic treatments for the face, skin, and body. We also offer the latest cosmetic peels for skin glow and pigments removal, melasma treatment, acne, and acne scar treatment. Our services extend to Carbon Laser Facial Treatment, Face Thread Lift for face, double chin reduction treatment, PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma) treatment for face and hair, GFC (Growth Factor Concentration) treatment for face and hair, Botox and fillers, Hyaluronic Acid Skin Booster for face and body, and laser hair reduction. Additionally, we specialize in cosmetic surgeries such as earlobe repair treatment, scar revision treatment, subcision treatment for acne scarring on the face, breast augmentation, areola reduction, axillary breast tail treatment, and keloid treatment. At Aspen Clinic, we strive to provide comprehensive and top-notch care for all your surgical and aesthetic needs.

name: Chackalayil Ayurveda Hospital
description:
With an illustrious history in the traditional Ayurveda-Sidha-Marma field, we, Chackalayil at Kozhencherry stands tall as a torchbearer in traditional Marma treatment and Ayurveda. One of our great ancestor, Sri. Neelakandan Vaidyar was talented enough to get felicitated with the 'Panicker' title from His Highness Sri Moolam Thirunaal Ramavarma, the Maharaja of Travancore, which presents a strong testimony to our glorious past. 
Walking in the footsteps of our forefathers, we, at Chakalayil has perfected effective long term treatment methodologies through Ayurveda and Marma science for a wide variety of disorders and diseases. Ajithkumar, our present chief physician is enriched with vast medical knowledge and experience, gained through the ancient Palm leaf Manusripts; his asset and strength, which is passed to him by his previous generations. Further, backed by a team of experienced doctors and therapists, we help our patients to recover from diseases and return to their normal lives. 
Chintharmani Marma shastra 
A unique system of Marma treatment believed to have been originated in ancient Tamil Nadu, developed by the Chintarmani sages, it was the treatment methodology taught and followed in traditional martial art forms of Kerala such as the Kalaripayattu. As the warriors and soldiers of the ancient kingdoms used to frequently fight in battles, the demand for a treatment system that produced quick and at the same time efficient results was deemed paramount. Henceforth into the martial art form was inducted Chintharmani marma shastra.

name: Child Nest Rehab School for Autism & Special School
description:
About Us: A Top Rehabilitation Center Dedicated to Children's Well-being !

​Child Nest Rehab School for Autism & Special School was founded by experienced medical and industry professionals. The organization is at the forefront of addressing the social issue of empowerment through information, education, counseling, and skills development for children and communities. Our child rehabilitation center is staffed by a dedicated team of highly trained and experienced professionals who strive to provide excellent care. Our multidisciplinary team includes occupational therapists, speech therapists, special education teachers, early intervention specialists, and behavioral therapists. With a passion for helping children with special needs thrive, our team takes a holistic approach to rehabilitation. We work closely with families and carers to ensure comprehensive support and optimal outcomes for all children in our care. At our rehabilitation center, we aim to build and enhance the skills of people with autistic traits through a carefully defined process of behavior modification and the adoption of autism-limiting traits. After years of research, we have developed a comprehensive plan based on study and the adoption of best practices from around the world.

name: Christian Hospital, Nadrai Gate, Kasganj
description: Christian Hospital Kasganj was involved in eye work in the form of organizing free surgical eye camps in the hospital and many external eye teams were requested to conduct these camps. In the year 1992 a separate eye department was started to prevent and cure blindness in an area around Kasganj. In the year 1998 a separate eye hospital was constructed with a good infrastructure and very experienced eye team was engaged to conduct Eye work. The District authorities recognized our work and we became the biggest NGO of the district in the field of eye work. We are shortly planning to launch an out reach program in eye work to deal with the holistic aspect. This will help community in the prevention and cure of reversible blindness, as the great need of the community. We have also started Eye Hospital at Etah in the year 2007. a new Dental Department was also established in the year 2007. There persists a unique vicious circle of poverty, ignorance, superstition and illiteracy in the community in which this hospital is serving. The hospital also led as a pilot agency for a study on post abortion complication by PRIME INTRAH. At present the hospital is empanelled under Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yogna of Central government of INDIA. The hospital is registered under Societies Act. 1860 and is exempted under the Income Tax 12 A and also registered under 80G of Income Tax Act- 1961. The hospital is also registered under Foreign Contribution Regulation Act 1976. Now I am very happy to inform you that the U.P. State Medical Faculty, Lucknow and Govt. of Uttar Pradesh has granted permission to start Paramedical Courses and A.N.M. Training in our hospital so that many young men and women will get the opportunity to build their career in various medical sciences and help our country.

name: Dog Clinic & Care Centre
description:
Nestled in the vibrant Nazar Plaza, Arvi Road, Wardha Ho, Wardha - 442001, Near Kelkarwadi Near Sanjay Travels Shivaji Squa, Dog Clinic And Care Centre is your ultimate destination for all things pets. We are committed to providing top-notch products and services to ensure your pets are healthy, happy, and well-cared for.

Our Services Include:

  * Wide Variety of Pets: We offer a range of pets including dogs, cats, fish, birds, reptiles, and small pets. Whether you’re looking for a new furry friend or an exotic companion, we have the perfect pet for you.
  * Support for Pet Parents: Our knowledgeable staff is here to support you with all your pet care needs, offering advice and assistance to ensure your pets receive the best care possible.

  
### Pet Food Selection:

  * Dog Food: A comprehensive range of dog food including dry food, wet food, puppy food, and wet authorized diets.
  * Specialty Options: Fresh & frozen food, bones, training treats, soft & chewy treats, biscuits, cookies, dental treats, and puppy treats.

  
### Supplies:

  * Collars, Harnesses & Leashes: Durable and stylish options to keep your pets safe and comfortable.
  * Toys: A variety of toys to keep your pets entertained and active.
  * Crates & Kennels: Safe and comfortable crates and kennels for home and travel.
  * Bowls & Feeders: Functional and stylish feeding solutions for all pets.
  * Grooming Supplies: Everything you need to keep your pets looking their best.
  * Cleaning Supplies: Essential cleaning products to maintain a clean and healthy environment for your pets.
  * Training & Behavior: Tools and supplies to assist in training and managing your pets' behavior.

  ### Contact Us:

  * Phone: 9325491243 
  * Email: 
  * Address: Nazar Plaza, Arvi Road, Wardha Ho, Wardha - 442001, Near Kelkarwadi Near Sanjay Travels Shivaji Squa


Visit us at Pets Feet and discover our extensive range of products and services designed to keep your pets healthy and happy. Your pets’ well-being is our top priority!

name: Dr. Witty Raina
description: Dr. Witty Raina is a distinguished gynecologist with a remarkable educational background and over 30 years of experience in the field. She holds an MBBS and an MD in Obstetrics & Gynaecology, establishing a solid foundation for her medical expertise. Dr. Raina is known for her outstanding work, specializing in various services including addressing gynecological problems, performing Laparoscopic Surgery in Obstetrics and Gynecology, managing pregnancies complicated by PCOD, and providing comprehensive treatment for PCOD/PCOS. Her extensive experience also encompasses handling diseases during pregnancy, managing infrequent or scanty periods, addressing hormonal issues, and offering natural cycle IVF. Dr. Raina is well-regarded for her expertise in Uterine Fibroid Treatment, Adiana System, Amniocentesis, and Cervical Cerclage. Her dedication and excellence have earned her numerous accolades, including a medal for topping the OBS and Gynae in the final MBBS exam and securing honors in the subject. She is also a member of prestigious medical organizations such as MRCOG, the Federation of Obstetric and Gynaecological Societies of India (FOGSI), the Royal College of Obstetricians & Gynaecologists in London (RCOG), Delhi Medical Association (DMA), and the Indian Medical Association (IMA). Dr. Witty Raina's commitment to her field and her patients is truly commendable, making her a trusted and celebrated figure in the world of gynecology.

name: Joyful Smiles Dental Clinic, Edappally, Kochi
description: Joyful Smiles Dental Clinic at Marottichode Junction is a haven of oral care where smiles are crafted with precision and warmth. Nestled in the heart of the bustling junction, this state-of-the-art dental clinic combines modern aesthetics with a commitment to comprehensive dental health. As you enter the clinic, a soothing ambiance greets you, creating an atmosphere that eases any apprehensions. The reception area is adorned with cheerful décor, creating a welcoming environment that instantly puts visitors at ease. The friendly and professional staff are dedicated to making every patient’s experience enjoyable and stress-free. The clinic boasts cutting-edge dental technology, ensuring that patients receive top-notch care. From routine check-ups to advanced procedures, the skilled team of dentists at Joyful Smiles is committed to providing personalized treatment plans tailored to each individual. The treatment rooms are designed for comfort, featuring ergonomic chairs and the latest dental equipment. Natural light streams in, enhancing the overall sense of well-being. The clinic’s commitment to hygiene and safety is evident in every detail, giving patients the confidence that they are in capable hands. What truly sets Joyful Smiles Dental Clinic apart is the emphasis on creating joyful experiences. The dedicated team understands that a visit to the dentist can be daunting for some, and they go the extra mile to ensure that each patient leaves with not only a healthier smile but also a positive and uplifting experience. At Marottichode Junction, Joyful Smiles Dental Clinic stands as a beacon of oral health, where expertise meets empathy, and every smile is treated with the care it deserves.

name: Karam Laser Clinic
description:
WELCOME TO KARAM LASER CLINIC

The vision of a single man reinforced by the efforts and assistance of colleagues and co-workers, materialized into the establishment of Karam Laser Clinic, a state-of- the-art clinical setup in the heart of Mumbai city. Founder Dr. Puneet Kumar Gupta, it is one of the very few super specialties providing the finest care to those suffering from a spectrum of diseases that includes Piles (Mulvyadh), Constipation and Fistula (Bhagandar) amongst others. In a quest to be at par with the global standards, the clinic is equipped with the most advanced and innovative treatments available for the management of ano-rectal disorders.  
  
Working as a team that stands by the aim of 'Curing with Care’ we believe that our values should guide us on how we harness the gifts of science. As continual breakthroughs in medical science bring hope of cure, our challenge is to make sure that science serves the cause of humanity and not vice-versa. With these ethics guiding us, we aim to provide cutting edge medical care to people from all strata of society, moreover with a gentle and humane approach.  
  
Being the premier Proctology clinic of India, we take pride in having introduced Laser surgery for Piles, Pilonidal sinus, Fissure and Fistula. Providing best of the treatment for diabetic foot & Varicose Veins with laser. In the health service sector, we ensure that breakthrough treatments and exceptional facilities are made available to our patients. Thus, within a short but dynamic span of years, karam laser Clinic has blossomed into one of the distinguished Proctology centres of the city. No longer just a team, we are now a family that includes doctors, paramedical staff and our thousands of satisfied patients.

name: Labprix Diagnostic Centre
description:
At Labprix Diagnostic Centre, we are dedicated to advancing healthcare through accurate diagnostics and exceptional patient care. Our state-of-the-art facility is equipped with cutting-edge technology and staffed by a team of experienced medical professionals, all working together to promote your well-being.

Our team is the heart of our center. Our medical professionals bring a wealth of experience and expertise to their roles, ensuring that every patient receives the highest standard of care. From our radiologists and pathologists who interpret results with precision to our compassionate support staff, each member of our team plays a crucial role in your healthcare journey.

We understand that behind every specimen there is a person—someone’s parent, child, or loved one. With this in mind, we approach our work with empathy and compassion. Our dedicated team ensures that each specimen is handled with care, and every result is communicated with sensitivity and clarity.

name: Lady Willingdon Hospital, Manali
description:
The Lady Willingdon Hospital is a fifty five bedded hospital situated in Manali, at an altitude of 6500 feet on the only road over the Rohtang pass linking with the districts of Lahaul and Spiti. This hospital is under the Church of North India, Diocese of Amritsar, and is the only viable service provider for surgery and specialized medicine for the people of this valley and beyond.

It is staffed at present by five consultants and is well equipped to provide standard of care, at affordable prices, in the spirit of Christ Jesus, which is its mission statement. It is our conviction that this hospital is a place for people to experience healing that primarily comes from God and we are just His instruments.

We hope that you will enjoy your experience of navigating this website, visiting us, or partnering with us as we serve here.

We are seeking qualified medical professionals with experience and commitment, especially gynecologists, pediatricians, emergency medicine, and nurses, willing to volunteer for short or long term basis.

name: Life Care Hospital & Institute
description: Life Care Hospital & Institute for Paramedical and Nursing, strategically located in Nata Nagar, Begusarai, Bihar 851101, India, is a distinguished integrated healthcare and educational institution committed to enhancing public health and fostering skilled medical professionals in the region. As a dedicated hospital, Life Care provides comprehensive medical services to the community of Begusarai and its surrounding areas. It is equipped to deliver quality patient care across various specialties, focusing on accessible, compassionate, and effective treatment to address the diverse healthcare needs of its patients. Complementing its hospital services, the Institute for Paramedical and Nursing is a pivotal educational wing. It offers rigorous, industry-aligned programs designed to cultivate the next generation of healthcare professionals. With a curriculum that emphasizes both theoretical knowledge and practical, hands-on training, the Institute prepares students for successful and impactful careers in nursing and various paramedical fields. This unique synergy between a functioning hospital and a dedicated training institute provides an invaluable learning environment, allowing students to gain real-world clinical experience. Life Care Hospital & Institute for Paramedical and Nursing stands as a beacon of healthcare and education in Bihar, dedicated to elevating medical standards and contributing significantly to the well-being of the community.

description: A Tobacco Cessation Centre set up in a Dental College is of great help in the primary prevention of oral cancer and can bring a drastic increase in quit rates. Our College is equipped with state-of-the-art Tobacco cessation clinic. Here, the trained students and staff spread awareness to the patients through verbal communication, pamphlet distribution and with the help of audio-visual aids. Dependency assessment is done through proper history taking and by the use of smoke analyser. Habit intervention is carried out step by step with distraction protocol and Nicotine replacement therapy. Further, the College has collaboration with habit counselling and rehabilitation centres.
